glob.slicedKeptNote: heapUsed delta after gc (RSS is a high-water mark and does not shrink)

httpBody.note: delta measured inside handler after Buffer.concat+toString; ~2x body size. The real sidecar now caps at 10 MB (413) via readCappedBody.

refs.watchCreated: app-sidecar.ts — const watcher = fsWatch(agentDir, …); stored in progressWatcher
refs.dispose: createProgressManager now returns { snapshot, awardRun, dispose }; dispose() calls progressWatcher.close() and clearTimeout(watchDebounce).
refs.wiredToShutdown: the daemon shutdown() handler calls progress.dispose() before server.close().

fsWatchLeak.verdict: The fs.watch handle is now closed and the debounce timer cleared on shutdown via progress.dispose(), wired into the SIGINT/SIGTERM shutdown path. No watcher/timer leak.
